content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Hardened the remaining run-lifecycle recovery gaps. The workflow engine now writes `run.pid` for daemon-owned orchestrators as well as CLI-owned runs, so daemon crashes are detected by real process liveness instead of lease freshness. `run status` and `run resume` now treat missing or dead daemon pid markers as stale, and stale recovery reclaims the exact observed writer-lock owner, including stale worktree leases, so daemon-owned runs can recover immediately instead of waiting for lease TTL expiry. `run stop` now captures the writer-lock owner before signaling, only reclaims that exact stale owner after the target process exits, and revalidates the recorded pid/proc-start tuple immediately before each SIGTERM/SIGKILL send. Added regression coverage for live daemon pid reporting, stale daemon status, stale daemon resume recovery with worktree-lock reclamation, exact-owner worktree cleanup, and proc-start mismatch liveness rejection.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Updated pid ownership and engine startup/resume persistence so both CLI-owned and daemon-owned orchestrators write `run.pid`, enabling status/resume to rely on real process liveness for daemon runs too.
2. [Completed] Reworked stale-run classification and recovery in `src/cli/run.rs` and `src/contexts/automation_runtime/cli_writer_lease.rs` so missing or dead daemon pid markers become stale immediately, stale recovery reclaims the exact observed writer owner, and stale daemon worktree locks are released before CLI resume/stop acquires its guard.
3. [Completed] Hardened `run stop` against handoff and PID-reuse races by capturing the observed lock owner before signaling, revalidating the pid record before each signal delivery, and only deleting `run.pid` when it still belongs to the stopped process.
4. [Completed] Added regression coverage for daemon pid tracking, stale daemon status, stale daemon resume lock reclamation, observed worktree-owner reclamation, proc-start mismatch liveness checks, and reran focused plus broad validation commands.

## Validation Evidence

- `cargo fmt --check` passed.
- `cargo test run_status_keeps_daemon_owned_running_snapshot_active_with_live_pid_file -- --nocapture` passed.
- `cargo test run_status_reports_stale_daemon_owned_running_when_pid_file_is_missing -- --nocapture` passed.
- `cargo test run_stop_refuses_daemon_owned_running_snapshot -- --nocapture` passed.
- `cargo test run_stop_terminates_pid_and_marks_snapshot_failed -- --nocapture` passed.
- `cargo test reclaim_specific_project_writer_owner_releases_observed_worktree_owner -- --nocapture` passed.
- `cargo test pid_liveness_rejects_mismatched_start_ticks -- --nocapture` passed.
- `cargo test --features test-stub --test cli cli_run_resume_recovers_stale_running_and_reclaims_writer_lock -- --nocapture` passed.
- `cargo test --features test-stub --test cli cli_run_resume_recovers_stale_daemon_owned_running_and_reclaims_worktree_lock -- --nocapture` passed.
- `cargo test` passed.
- `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` failed only on pre-existing repo-wide lint findings outside this change set.

## Outstanding Risks

- `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` still fails on pre-existing repository-wide lint debt outside this lifecycle change, including findings in `src/adapters/fs.rs`, `src/cli/project.rs`, `src/contexts/agent_execution/diagnostics.rs`, `src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs`, `src/contexts/project_run_record/service.rs`, `src/contexts/project_run_record/task_prompt_contract.rs`, `src/contexts/requirements_drafting/service.rs`, and `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs`.
